description: Horary (Western) or Prashna (Jyotish) chart. Cast for the moment a sincere question is understood by the astrologer. questionDatetime is required. The question itself may be kept private.

record.description: Horary/Prashna chart. The chart is cast for the moment the astrologer receives and understands the question, not when the querent thinks of it. questionDatetime is therefore the astrologer's receipt moment.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Breaking changes bump to 2.0.0 in a new lexicon file.

questionDatetime.description: Datetime the question was received and understood by the astrologer (ISO 8601). Required.

questionSummary.description: Optional brief summary of the question category (e.g., 'Will I get the job?', 'Lost object — where is it?'). May be omitted for privacy.

querentDid.description: Optional DID of the person who asked the question. Set only with their consent.

place.description: Location where the question was received.

radicality.description: Whether the chart is considered radical (fit to judge) by the astrologer. Western horary concept.

judgment.description: Optional astrologer's judgment or delineation notes. May be omitted or kept private.

western.description: Western tropical astrological data. See space.chartid.defs#westernData.

extensions.description: Top-level extension point for fields not yet in spec.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this record was created (ISO 8601).
